Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(e.get\('display_name'\), e.get\('lat'\), e.get\('lon'\), e.get\('type'\)\) for e in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines[-20:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role', ''\) content = obj.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {c[\\"text\\"][:300]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:300]}'\) except: pass ")
